---
title: "Kyle Tolliver"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r load_libraries, include=FALSE}
source("./site_libs/site.R")
file <- "index"
```

```{r main}
print_portfolio()
nav()
print_pic("./site_libs/images/me.jpg")
print_newline()
print_about()
print_newline()
print_h4("Societies")
print_soc()
print_newline()
print_h4("Top Skills")
print_skills()
print_newline()
divbreak()
print_h2("Contact Me")
print_contact(file)
pagebreak()
print_newline()
print_h2("Highlights")
print_highlights() 
print_newline()
footer(file)
```
